crew.manualHint: Supervisor-entered. Cart-derivable (2 carts give 2, 4 carts give 4).

cabins.notes: Refreshments are cart-based (2 to 4 bar carts). Cat 7 to 8 add a galley social area plus cart snacks.
Refreshments are tray-based (water, orange juice, apple juice, mixed nuts). 500 ml water bottles cat 5 to 8. Cat 8 social-area snack basket.

Refreshments include fresh juice, vitality boost or a pre-mixed mocktail, mandatory at least once on cat 4 to 8 (time permitting on cat 3). One cycle crew remains in the galley to prepare and deliver orders before order-taking.

Adds Shower Spa checks and toilet roll origami (Cleanliness) and a seat refresh (Customer Care). Refreshments duty applies cat 3 to 8 only; on cat 1 to 2 a cycle is Cleanliness plus Customer Care only.
